top3.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR008');

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR008');

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR008';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR008');

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR008');

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR008';

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond b
JOIN molecule m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id
WHERE m.label = 'TR008';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN bond_type = 'double' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 
        5
    ) AS percentage_double_bonds
FROM bond
WHERE molecule_id = (SELECT molecule_id FROM molecule WHERE label = 'TR008');
